cases.scenario: Two detectors disagree over one exact Object Revision and Classification Decision retains both observations.
One polyglot input is routed to two compatible Pack Revisions and produces separate Inventories and Views.
Recursive extraction exhausts a child/depth/byte budget while retaining valid partial children and explicit unknown gaps.
Filename or extension is used as sole authoritative type evidence.
A replacement Pack/Provider revision produces competing derived revisions without changing source Object identity.
Disk Image Revision, Extent Map, partition-table copies, Partitions and Filesystem observations retain exact ranges and checks.
A partition or extent exceeds the exact image logical size.
Overlapping extents are present but no overlap finding/evidence is retained.
Untrusted filesystem inspection uses an isolated read-only Provider and records cleanup/unmount evidence.
A read-only inspection path attempts writable mutation without new authority and target isolation.
Firmware Package, Manifest, Components and executable assets are inventoried without physical-write authority.
Filename/model/chipset similarity alone is used to select a loader/programmer or authorize write.
Exact write compatibility, current Session/Connection/Provider context, verified immutable backup, Plan and Authorization precede mutation.
A destructive operation lacks policy-required backup and has no valid scoped Mutation Exception.
A narrow, expiring exception records authority, exact ranges, reason and compensating controls.
A mutation or completion uses an old connection epoch or Provider generation after re-enumeration/restart.
A physical retry reuses the previous Attempt identity or nonce.
Handshake, loader acceptance, service return or write acknowledgement is promoted to verified success without read-back.
Exact critical ranges are read back and compared under the immutable Operation Plan.
Disconnect during non-idempotent write creates uncertain outcome, preserves partial evidence and performs explicit recovery/reconciliation.
A non-idempotent write is retried before reconciliation after transport loss.
Video Stream fails while shell/log Streams and Device Session remain available with degraded scope.
A Screen Context from an old display/connection epoch is used as current semantic state.
Raw key, credential, protected identifier or calibration data appears in a public/ordinary record.
Parser, mount, transport or flasher backend replacement preserves canonical Object/Pack/Device and proof history.
